LanguageData.LBD_MainEvent_UI_1.label: Event
LanguageData.LBD_MainEvent_UI_1.descriptions.0.text: In the midst of silent ruins, this girl stands quietly. Her eyes are deep and cold, as if looking through the dust of countless centuries. Despite her fragile appearance, you can feel a suffocating pressure radiating from her—the aura of the legendary Miraboreasu.
LanguageData.LBD_MainEvent_UI_1.options.0.label: Who are you?
LanguageData.LBD_MainEvent_UI_1.options.1.label: Stay silent.
